front: Composer: Soviet/Ukrainian; 21st-century cult following; 20 piano sonatas infuse classical forms with written-out jazz (techniques of Art Tatum and Bill Evans)
Composer: Opus 41 Variations gives a swing treatment to The Rite of Spring's opening bassoon theme
Collection: third etude is a driving Toccatina in E minor
Work: Suite 'in the Old Style' — combines jazz improvisation with the classical suite form, modeled after Bach's suites
